## Verification

- [ ] `swift build`
- [ ] `swift test`
- [ ] `Tools/verify-codex-hook-events.sh`

## Checklist

- [ ] User-facing behavior is documented.
- [ ] New assets are listed in `docs/assets-and-licensing.md`.
- [ ] Security-sensitive behavior is documented or called out for review.
